zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud de Chaworth於1282年2月2日出生在威爾士卡馬特史爾吉德維爾利時，她的父親Sir Patrick de Chaworth VI Lord Of Kidwelly31歲，母親Lady Isabella de Beauchamp34歲。她於1297年與Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster在威爾士卡馬特史爾吉德維爾利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1322年12月3日在英國哈普爾莫迪斯方特享年40歲，埋葬在英國哈普爾莫迪斯方特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud de Chaworth于1282年2月2日出生在威尔士卡馬特史爾吉德維爾利时，她的父亲Sir Patrick de Chaworth VI Lord Of Kidwelly31岁，母亲Lady Isabella de Beauchamp34岁。她于1297年与Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster在威尔士卡馬特史爾吉德維爾利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1322年12月3日在英国哈普爾莫迪斯方特享年40岁，埋葬在英国哈普爾莫迪斯方特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Chaworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Haworth (Yorkshire), probably from Old English haga ‘hedge, enclosure’ + worth ‘enclosure’.

variants.name: Howarth
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Howarth in Rochdale (Lancashire), possibly from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + worth ‘enclosure’. The name may have been confused with Haworth .

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud de Chaworth was born on 2 February 1282, in Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Wales, her father, Sir Patrick de Chaworth VI Lord Of Kidwelly, was 31 and her mother, Lady Isabella de Beauchamp, was 34. She married Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster in 1297, in Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 6 daughters. She died on 3 December 1322, in Mottisfont, Hampshire, England, at the age of 40, and was buried in Mottisfont, Hampshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud de Chaworth est née le 2 février 1282, à Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Galles, son père, Sir Patrick de Chaworth VI Lord Of Kidwelly, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Lady Isabella de Beauchamp, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster en 1297, à Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 décembre 1322, à Mottisfont, Hampshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterrée à Mottisfont, Hampshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud de Chaworth am 2. Februar 1282 in Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Patrick de Chaworth VI Lord Of Kidwelly 31 und ihre Mutter Lady Isabella de Beauchamp 34. Sie hat 1297 in Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Wales Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. Dezember 1322 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Mottisfont, Hampshire, England und wurde in Mottisfont, Hampshire, England begraben.

Lei sposato Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster nel 1297, nel Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 6 figlie. Morì il 3 dicembre 1322, nel Mottisfont, Hampshire, England, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolta a Mottisfont, Hampshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud de Chaworthが1282年2月2日にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアキドウエリーで生まれた時，父Sir Patrick de Chaworth VI Lord Of Kidwellyは31歳，母Lady Isabella de Beauchampは34歳であった。1297年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアキドウエリーでHenry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancasterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1322年12月3日にイギリスハンプシュアイアモッティスフォントで40歳で死去し，イギリスハンプシュアイアモッティスフォントにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud de Chaworth(이)가 1282년 2월 2일 웨일스 카마테실르 키드웰이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Patrick de Chaworth VI Lord Of Kidwelly(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Isabella de Beauchamp(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1297년 웨일스 카마테실르 키드웰이에서 Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1322년 12월 3일 영국 함프실르 모티스폰트에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 함프실르 모티스폰트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud de Chaworth nasceu em 2 de fevereiro de 1282, em Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Gales, seu pai, Sir Patrick de Chaworth VI Lord Of Kidwelly, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Lady Isabella de Beauchamp, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster em 1297, em Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de dezembro de 1322, em Mottisfont, Hampshire, Inglaterra, com 40 anos, e foi sepultada em Mottisfont, Hampshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud de Chaworth родилась 2 февраля 1282 г. в местности кидвелли, кармартеншир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Sir Patrick de Chaworth VI Lord Of Kidwelly было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Isabella de Beauchamp, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster в 1297 г. в местности кидвелли, кармартеншир, Уэльс. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 3 декабря 1322 г. в местности моттисфонт, хампшир, Англия в возрасте 40 лет и была похоронена в местности моттисфонт, хампшир, Англия.

Se casó con Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster en 1297, en Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 6 hijas. Murió el 3 de diciembre de 1322, en Mottisfont, Hampshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultada en Mottisfont, Hampshire, Inglaterra.
